settings.heading: Contact Us
settings.text: Have a question, need help, or want to talk through your next idea? Send us a message and we’ll point you in the right direction.
settings.side_text: Use this page for general questions, order help, or anything that does not need a formal quote.
settings.help_text: If you need pricing, custom apparel, promo products, or design help, head to the Request Quote page so we can get the right details from the start.
